candidates.why: Best balance-sheet cash and cash equivalents measure; matches cash flow ending cash line.

variables.notes: Used the minimal set of financing-related current debt lines. Excluded 'Short-term portion of other non-current liabilities' because it likely includes lease/current non-debt items, and excluded lease rows per rule.

candidates.why: Direct match for taxes payable/current tax liabilities.
Major tangible fixed-asset category and clear PPE component.
Clear PPE component.
Clear PPE component.
Could be presented alongside fixed assets under IFRS, but baseline PPE is better represented by owned PP&E components and leases are typically excluded.

variables.notes: No single total PPE row is visible, so selected the reported PPE component rows as a priority set. Excluded 'Right-of-use assets' to avoid lease-related assets in baseline PPE mapping.

candidates.why: Direct match for total assets.

final_choice.row_label: Cash flows from (used in) operating activities

variables.notes: Chose the cash flow statement line with reported values rather than the blank header-like candidate.
